compiled_state.title: Create sync-eval-model-ids.sh update script
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/sync-eval-model-ids.sh that:
1. Reads model.haiku, model.sonnet, model.opus via resolve-model-id.sh
2. Finds all promptfooconfig.yaml under plugins/dso/ and evals/
3. For EACH tier, uses sed to replace ALL claude-{tier}-[0-9]* patterns (both dated and undated) with config model ID
4. Skips lines containing # model-pin comment
5. Reports count of files updated
6. Exits 0 on success
Remove RED marker from .test-index.

TDD: Task 3 RED tests turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/sync-eval-model-ids.sh
- [ ] Tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sync-eval-model-ids.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Task context loaded ✓ - Create sync-eval-model-ids.sh that reads model tiers via resolve-model-id.sh, finds all promptfooconfig.yaml, and sed-replaces claude-{tier}-[0-9]* patterns while skipping # model-pin lines
comments.author: Main

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Files read ✓ - resolve-model-id.sh interface understood; test-sync-eval-model-ids.sh studied; RED confirmed (2/19 passing, 17 failures all due to missing script)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: RED confirmed (17 failing) → Implementation complete ✓ - sync-eval-model-ids.sh created with: resolve-model-id.sh PATH-stub pattern, python3 line-by-line replacement, # model-pin skip, file count reporting. RED marker removed from .test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: GREEN ✓ - All 19 tests passing (was 17 failing)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Self-check ✓ - All 3 AC verify commands pass. Found 11 promptfooconfig.yaml files in plugins/dso/ with hardcoded model IDs that would benefit from sync-eval-model-ids.sh — this is expected (the new script will be used to update them)
comments.author: Main

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Complete ✓ - No discovered anti-pattern bugs requiring separate tracking (the 11 files with hardcoded model IDs is the expected use case for the new script, not a bug)
